description: package.json only - classified as unknown domain (ignored)
rationale: package.json does not match any domain pattern (not .toml/.yaml/.yml/.env, not in /config/). Classified as unknown domain which is ignored. 0 active domains = PASS.
notes: FALSE NEGATIVE example: package.json is a config file conceptually, but ghlint classifies it as unknown. A PR bumping a vulnerable dependency in package.json passes even if mixed with API changes, because package.json itself doesn't count.
